Aequitas hybrid stack.","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Deploys the full protocol stack, including the actuarial proof layer,         and wires the role graph so the system is         executable end-to-end out of the box. Intended for local Anvil         or Sepolia.         Usage (local):             anvil &                            # in another terminal             forge script script/Deploy.s.sol \\                 --rpc-url localhost            \\                 --private-key $ANVIL_PK        \\                 --broadcast         Usage (Sepolia):             cp .env.example .env && fill in keys             source .env             forge script script/Deploy.s.sol  \\                 --rpc-url sepolia             \\                 --private-key $DEPLOYER_PK    \\                 --broadcast --verify         After deployment the addresses are printed to stdout and also         written to `deployments/latest.txt` so the Python bridge can pick         them
